title: Faithful Darker Bedrock
description: Reworks the Faithful bedrock texture palette
body:
This is a very simple resource pack, it only changes one texture in the Faithful pack. It makes the palette used in the bedrock texture more coherent. Instead of pixels from dark grey to light grey, this changes them all to dark grey.

As this pack only modifies a single texture, you will still need Faithful 32x for this pack to work. The bedrock texture credit goes to the Faithful team. I simply adjusted the hues and saturation to create a more true-to-life bedrock colour. Support the Faithful project.

Q: **Classic Faithful verison?**
A: Maybe, I don’t use the classic version of Faithful but if it gets enough support, I would be happy to make a classic or classic jappa variant.

Q: **Are you allowed to modify Faithfuls Textures?**
A: Yes, under the Faithful license I can modify Faithful textures and re-release them. As long as I follow specific criteria.

Q: **I don’t like the new texture**
A: Then don’t use it. This pack is an optional addon for anyone who wants to use it.
